subtopics: Need for measurement, Units of measurement, Systems of units, SI units (fundamental and derived), Significant figures, Determining uncertainty in result
key_concepts: Dimensions of physical quantities, Dimensional analysis and its applications

subtopics: Frame of reference, Motion in straight line, Elementary concepts of differentiation and integration for describing motion
key_concepts: Uniform and non-uniform motion, Average speed/velocity, Instantaneous velocity, Uniformly accelerated motion (graphical/calculus), Velocity-time and position-time graphs

subtopics: Scalar and vector quantities, Position and displacement vectors, Vector notation, Equality of vectors, Multiplication by real number, Addition/subtraction of vectors
key_concepts: Unit vector, Resolution in plane (rectangular components), Scalar and Vector product, Projectile motion, Uniform circular motion

subtopics: Intuitive concept of force, Inertia, Newton's First Law (Law of inertia), Momentum and Second Law, Impulse
key_concepts: Newton's Third Law, Conservation of linear momentum, Equilibrium of concurrent forces, Static/Kinetic friction laws, Rolling friction, Lubrication
Dynamics of uniform circular motion (Centripetal force), Examples: vehicle on level/banked road

subtopics: Work done by constant/variable force, Kinetic energy, Work-energy theorem
key_concepts: Power, Potential energy (including spring), Conservative and non-conservative forces, Motion in vertical circle
Elastic and inelastic collisions (1D and 2D)

chapters.source_chapter_name: System of Particles and Rotational Motion
subtopics: Centre of mass (two-particle system, rigid body, uniform rod), Momentum conservation
key_concepts: Moment of force (Torque), Angular momentum and its conservation, Equilibrium of rigid bodies
Rigid body rotation equations, Comparison linear/rotational motions, Moment of inertia, Radius of gyration

subtopics: Kepler's laws of planetary motion, Universal law of gravitation
key_concepts: Acceleration due to gravity (variation with altitude/depth), Gravitational potential energy and potential
Escape speed, Orbital velocity of satellite, Energy of orbiting satellite
Hooke's law, Young’s modulus, Bulk modulus, Shear modulus (qualitative), Poisson's ratio, Elastic energy
Application of elastic behavior (qualitative)

subtopics: Pressure due to fluid column, Pascal's law (hydraulic lift/brakes), Effect of gravity on pressure
key_concepts: Viscosity and Stokes' law, Terminal velocity, Streamline/turbulent flow, Critical velocity
Bernoulli's theorem (Torricelli's law/Dynamic lift)
Surface energy/tension, Angle of contact, Excess pressure across curved surface

subtopics: Heat, Temperature, Thermal expansion (solids/liquids/gases), Anomalous expansion
key_concepts: Specific heat capacity (Cp/Cv), Calorimetry, Change of state (latent heat)
Heat transfer: Conduction, Convection, Radiation
Blackbody radiation concepts (Wein's displacement Law, Stefan's law)

subtopics: Thermal equilibrium, Zeroth law of thermodynamics
key_concepts: Heat, Work, Internal energy (First Law)
Second Law: State variables, Equation of state
Gaseous processes: Isothermal, Adiabatic, Reversible/Irreversible, Cyclic

subtopics: Equation of state, Work done in compressing gas
key_concepts: Kinetic theory assumptions and pressure concept
Temperature interpretation (rms speed), Degrees of freedom
Law of equipartition of energy (statement only) for specific heats
Mean free path, Avogadro's number

subtopics: Periodic motion (time period, frequency), Displacement as function of time
key_concepts: Simple Harmonic Motion (S.H.M) and uniform circular motion equations
Phase, Oscillations of loaded spring (restoring force/force constant)
Energy in S.H.M. (Kinetic/Potential), Simple pendulum time period derivation

subtopics: Wave motion (Transverse/Longitudinal), Speed of travelling wave
key_concepts: Displacement relation for progressive wave, Principle of superposition
Reflection of waves, Standing waves in strings and organ pipes
Fundamental mode and harmonics, Beats
